entries.title: Oatly Creator Brand Voice 2026 Q4
entries.body: Oatly creator voice: dry, observational, lower-case where it serves. Avoid superlatives. Avoid the word delicious. Use brand handle as @oatly. Lean into the every-day moment (morning bowl, kitchen counter, the kettle is loud). Captions short, no hashtags beyond @oatly. Sign-off optional.

entries.title: Voice DOs
entries.body: DO: lower-case, dry observation, kitchen-rhythm, single-detail focus.

entries.title: Voice DON'Ts
entries.body: DON'T: superlatives, exclamation marks, hashtag stacks, recipe walkthroughs in caption.

entries.title: Oatly Q4 color palette
entries.body: Warm cream, oat tan, kitchen-window white, soft slate. Hex chips in brand asset bundle.

entries.title: Logo and lockup usage
entries.body: Logo placement: bottom-right, 5% margin. No outline. No drop shadow. Tag @oatly in copy.

entries.title: Hashtag policy
entries.body: Use @oatly mention only. No #oatly hashtag. No campaign hashtag unless brief specifies.

entries.title: Caption cadence
entries.body: 2 posts per month + stories. Tue post baseline. Spillover to Sun acceptable, not Wed.

entries.title: Emoji policy
entries.body: Max 1 emoji per caption. Avoid sparkle, fire, hearts. Acceptable: morning, kettle, mug.

entries.title: Punctuation norms
entries.body: Use commas and periods only. No semicolons. No em-dashes. Hyphen-minus for breaks.

entries.title: Voice example A: morning bowl
entries.body: morning bowl. oats steeped slow, plum jam from the chinatown stall, single coin of butter. @oatly

entries.title: Voice example B: barista series
entries.body: barista series 1 of 3. she pulled it twice because the first one foamed wrong. @oatly

entries.title: Voice example C: cold latte
entries.body: between-takes. oatmilk reduces into coffee like it has been doing this its whole life. @oatly

entries.title: Voice example D: kettle
entries.body: the kettle is the loudest thing in the apartment at 6am. @oatly

entries.title: Voice example E: kitchen sketch
entries.body: kitchen sketch. oatmilk in the pyrex, late afternoon window light, no flash. @oatly

entries.title: Voice example F: behind the set
entries.body: behind-the-set. assistant hands holding the pour at the right height. @oatly

entries.title: Brand fact sheet
entries.body: Oatly: oatmilk brand, Sweden HQ, NA team Brooklyn. Dairy-free positioning is brand-level.

entries.title: Legal review notes
entries.body: Health claims require legal review. Avoid words like healthier, cleaner, better-for-you.

entries.title: Sign-off workflow
entries.body: Caption draft to Jesse, Jesse approves, Sophie cc'd, then publish. Never publish without Jesse approval.

entries.title: Holiday calendar
entries.body: Thanksgiving and Christmas posts run on cadence; no special holiday posts unless brief specifies.

entries.title: Archive index 2024-2026
entries.body: Past posts indexed by month in Dropbox /Brand Assets/Oatly/ archive folder.
